headlines.title: IMF warns Middle East instability could have lasting impact on Africa
headlines.snippet: The IMF's Africa director, Zeine Zeidane, warns that instability in the Middle East, caused by the US-Israeli war on Iran, poses lasting challenges to African economies, particularly impacting food security and agricultural costs due to disruptions in fertilizer exports.

headlines.title: Vance says Iran must back commitments with actions, not words
headlines.snippet: US Vice President JD Vance stated that progress with Iran will be measured by actions, not words, despite productive talks in Switzerland. He emphasized that Iran's decision to allow weapons and nuclear inspectors is significant, but the US will closely monitor the actual access granted.

headlines.title: Gaza death toll rises to 73,035 as Israeli attacks continue
headlines.snippet: The death toll in Gaza has reached 73,035, with 173,368 Palestinians wounded since October 2023. Medical sources cited by Wafa report 1,005 Palestinian deaths since the US-brokered ceasefire, indicating ongoing attacks despite the agreement.

headlines.title: US suspends Iran sanctions after 'good progress' in talks
headlines.snippet: The US has suspended sanctions against Iran following high-level talks in Switzerland, characterized by US Vice President JD Vance as productive, despite disagreements over nuclear and weapons inspections.

headlines.title: Vance says US and Iranian negotiators remain in Switzerland for talks
headlines.snippet: US Vice President JD Vance confirmed that American and Iranian negotiators are continuing talks in Switzerland to finalize details of an interim agreement, with a significant portion of both teams remaining to work on the specifics.
